utterances.speaker: Alice
utterances.text: Good morning everyone. Let's get started with the sprint sync.

utterances.speaker: Bob
utterances.text: Sure. I finished the auth module yesterday and pushed to staging.

utterances.speaker: Alice
utterances.text: Great. Any blockers on the deployment side?

utterances.speaker: Carol
utterances.text: Yes, the CI pipeline is failing on the integration tests. I need Bob's help to fix the env variables.

utterances.speaker: Bob
utterances.text: I can look at that today. Should be a quick fix.

utterances.speaker: Alice
utterances.text: Perfect. Let's also discuss the timeline for the Q3 features. We committed to delivering the dashboard by next Tuesday.

utterances.speaker: Carol
utterances.text: I think that's tight. The design review hasn't happened yet and we have a dependency on the analytics API.

utterances.speaker: Alice
utterances.text: That's a risk. Bob, can you escalate the API dependency to the platform team?

utterances.speaker: Bob
utterances.text: Will do. I'll set up a meeting with them this afternoon.

utterances.speaker: Alice
utterances.text: Good. Let's reconvene on Thursday to check progress. Meeting adjourned.
